title: CUQOO Bamboo Cheese Board Set with 3 Knives & Fork – Wooden Charcuterie Board, Cheeseboard Gift Set for Serving, Grazing, Cheese Boards & Knives, Cheese Platter for Cheese Lovers
features: 𝐒𝐓𝐘𝐋𝐈𝐒𝐇 & 𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐋𝐄 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐀𝐍𝐘 𝐎𝐂𝐂𝐀𝐒𝐈𝐎𝐍 – Elevate your gatherings with the CUQOO Cheese Board and Knife Set, perfect for serving cheeses, meats, fruits, and snacks. Whether it's a casual night in or a formal event, this sleek board with a hidden drawer and stainless steel knives ensures you serve in style.

𝐈𝐃𝐄𝐀𝐋 𝐆𝐈𝐅𝐓 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐂𝐇𝐄𝐄𝐒𝐄 𝐋𝐎𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒 – A thoughtful gift for any occasion, this cheese board set is perfect for housewarmings, weddings, or holidays. Impress your friends and family with its stylish design and practical features.

𝐃𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐀𝐍𝐃 𝐍𝐀𝐓𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐋𝐋𝐘 𝐀𝐍𝐓𝐈𝐁𝐀𝐂𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐀𝐋 – Made from high-quality bamboo, this serving board provides a sturdy, long-lasting surface for all your appetizers. Naturally antibacterial, bamboo is a safe and hygienic choice for food prep.
𝐄𝐂𝐎-𝐅𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐃𝐋𝐘 & 𝐒𝐔𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 – Crafted from biodegradable bamboo, this eco-friendly cheese board helps reduce your environmental impact without sacrificing style. Sustainable, durable, and practical.

𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐘 𝐂𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆 & 𝐌𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐄 – Cleaning is a breeze—simply hand wash with warm, soapy water to keep the board and knives in excellent condition. The generous 21 x 21 x 4.0 cm size offers plenty of space for a variety of appetizers.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Previous page Next page What comes in the set? The set includes a premium bamboo cheese board with a pull-out drawer and four stainless steel cheese knives, perfect for serving an assortment of cheeses, meats, fruits, and snacks. What material is the cheese board made from? The board is crafted from high-quality bamboo—naturally durable, lightweight, and resistant to odours and staining, perfect for food presentation. Is the drawer easy to slide in and out? Yes, the pull-out drawer glides smoothly and securely holds the four included cheese knives, offering convenient access and a space-saving design perfect for entertaining. Is this cheese board easy to clean? Wipe clean with a damp cloth and mild soap. Avoid soaking in water or putting it in the dishwasher to maintain the natural finish and longevity of the bamboo. Is this suitable as a gift? Absolutely! The cheese board set comes packaged beautifully—ideal for birthdays, weddings, housewarmings, or celebrations. It’s a thoughtful and practical gift for anyone who enjoys entertaining.
